posts.text: Being raised by a single immigrant mother, I have always seen immigrants as such strong and brave people and the idea that these human beings who are experiencing life for their first time decide to leave everything they know - their families, language, cultures, safety in familiarity for a hope at a better life for them and their future families who then come and work in silence working the jobs others don’t want to work and then for their sacrifice to be taken away is something I will never al

Last one about the Oscars, I swear but I saw these two videos and just wanted to show the support and opposition the Asian community received while making historical wins. #oscars #kpopdemonhunters #emmastone #guillermodeltoro #aloha
Free 🇵🇸, Congo, 🇸🇩 , 🇮🇷 , 🇻🇪, and also F 🧊. Simple. #charithrachandran #sajakilani #onepiece #brigerton #oscars
These Asian women couldn’t even go the night they make history without being grabbed and microaggressed on National TV… in 2026. #kpopdemonhunters #audreynuna #ejae #reiami #oscars
I don’t care how cringe this is. I will never be ok again bc what do you mean 🫠 #autumnduraldarkapaw #leasalonga #filipina
Historical wins for Asian representation at the Oscars tonight for both South Koreans and Filipinos. #kpopdemonhunters #oscars #autumnduraldarkapaw #korean #filipina

The Pho Brisket Banh Mi needs to be a permanent fixture on the menu bc it is a sin that people do not get to experience that year round. @goldbanhofficial in Glendora and Long Beach #banhmi #brisket #pho #pastrami #foodreview
I can see how Trump is confused bc his hxtred was “passed down to him” but that’s bc he refuses to realize his hxtred is a constant choice he makes. #fdt #immigrant #zohranmamdani #genetics

I mean, I feel like this is not applicable to most of us bc we aren’t evil or dxmb enough to do this, but but either way, the FBI is allegedly working directly with social media companies. #fdt #fbi #luigimangione #bigbrother #palantir

The UN estimated it would cost $40Billion to eliminate hunger throughout the whole world for 1 year and Pete Hegseth spent more than double that in 1 month just to keep his clearly overestimated budget for next year. So we have more than enough money for universal healthcare or to end world hunger, they just don’t care about any of us. #petehegseth #worldhunger #unitednations #fdt
